description: Install or update BMad Builder module config and help entries.
args: {-H: headless mode}|{inline values: skip prompts with provided values}

description: Create, edit, or rebuild an agent skill through conversational discovery.
args: {-H: headless mode}|{description: initial agent concept}|{path: existing agent to edit or rebuild}

description: Run quality analysis on an existing agent — structure, cohesion, prompt craft, and enhancement opportunities.
Create, edit, or rebuild a workflow or utility skill.
args: {-H: headless mode}|{description: initial skill concept}|{path: existing skill to edit or rebuild}

description: Run quality analysis on an existing workflow/skill — structure, efficiency, and enhancement opportunities.
Convert any skill to BMad-compliant, outcome-driven equivalent with before/after HTML comparison report.
args: {--convert: path or URL to source skill}|{-H: headless mode}

description: Brainstorm and plan a BMad module — explore ideas, decide architecture, and produce a build plan.
Scaffold module infrastructure into built skills, making them an installable BMad module.
args: {-H: headless mode}|{path: skills folder or single SKILL.md}

description: Check that a module's structure is complete, accurate, and all capabilities are properly registered.
args: {-H: headless mode}|{path: module or skill to validate}

description: Install or update LENS module config, help entries, and output directories.
args: {-H: headless mode}|{inline values: skip prompts with provided values}

description: Guide users to the next LENS or BMAD step for discovery, slicing, traceability, and validation.
Classify incoming work as top-down discovery, bottom-up slice growth, bridge work, validation, or correction.
Create a stable slice record from one useful thing without forcing system, domain, or capability promotion.
Frame a candidate slice with goal, starts-with, ends-with, vertical path, evidence, and boundaries.
Tighten a slice scope by separating required work, explicit exclusions, risks, and acceptance evidence.
Detect weak or strong adjacency between slices through shared artifacts, workflow, risks, or dependencies.
Detect repeated pressure across slices, artifacts, risks, workflows, dependencies, and ownership concerns.
Prepare evidence-driven promotion candidates while keeping promotion optional and human-reviewed.
Run a discovery epoch for a large ambiguous system before PRD or architecture work begins.
Capture sessions, notes, documents, screenshots, codebase hints, and BMAD artifacts without treating them as truth.
Extract candidate roles, outcomes, journeys, artifacts, risks, assumptions, and relationships from raw material.
outputs: extraction yaml and extraction index update

description: Assess whether context is sufficient for PRD, architecture, or BMAD planning and block premature PRD creation.
Turn context gaps into focused BMAD domain, market, technical, adversarial, or elicitation research tasks.
Model a system thesis, roles, stakeholders, principles, constraints, assumptions, risks, and non-goals.
Map role-specific outcomes and stakeholder value without jumping directly to features or PRD.
Map operating loops that explain repeated system behavior, evidence movement, decisions, and state changes.
Map end-to-end journeys across roles, data, decisions, system surfaces, and success evidence.
Select thin vertical slices from a mapped journey using sequencing rationale and acceptance evidence.
Derive capability candidates from journeys, slices, repeated pressure, and implementation evidence.
Create a slice impact map covering likely files, services, contracts, tests, workstreams, data, privacy, and decisions.
Promote reviewed entities and relationships into the Living Landscape without rewriting archive history.
outputs: landscape ledger updates and promotion decision

description: Regenerate the Derived Map, relationship index, traceability index, freshness index, and warnings from source truth.
Prepare a focused BMAD packet for the active slice with scope, exclusions, decisions, risks, and acceptance evidence.
Sync BMAD artifacts back into LENS traceability, relationships, implementation evidence, and landscape updates.
outputs: BMAD sync report and evidence records

description: Check that a BMAD story traces to an active LENS slice and does not silently expand scope.
Validate whether implementation evidence satisfies the active slice goal, scope, exclusions, and acceptance evidence.
Validate whether implemented slices still support the intended journey steps, decisions, state changes, and evidence flow.
Validate whether slices and journeys satisfy the intended outcome evidence rather than only shipping features.
Raise and propagate upstream correction signals when implementation reveals reality that changes assumptions or scope.
outputs: salmon signal, propagation report, decision record

description: Audit LENS topology for orphaned entities, duplicate IDs, missing sources, stale ledgers, contradictions, and trace gaps.
Produce read-only stakeholder visibility from the Derived Map for status, risks, blockers, evidence, and BMAD progress.
